title: LiLaC
description: Lib Lapis Core - common code for opekope2's mods
body:
# LiLaC is discontinued

LiLaC aimed to provide a common API for different Minecraft versions, helping [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) supporting multiple versions of the game. However, it became a relatively big and complex codebase, which is very prone to bugs and oversights. Other than that, I lost interest in maintaining it. [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) will continue to receive updates and additions, but without LiLaC, and only for recent versions of the game.
